Document:
# Cooking Guide
Cooking is one of the most important skills for an Innkeeper. You'll transform raw ingredients into delicious meals to serve guests and make profit.
## What You'll Work With
As an Innkeeper, you'll need various tools and ingredients to prepare meals.
### Cookware & Utensils
### Cooking Equipment
### Heat Sources
### Basic Ingredients
## Temperature System
The cooking system uses temperature to transform raw ingredients into cooked food.
- [bold]0-400K:[/bold] Raw ingredients - [bold]400-500K:[/bold] Cooked (edible) - [bold]500K+:[/bold] Burnt (inedible, becomes trash)
### Tips
- Use the [color=#ffa500]Fire Creation[/color] spell instead of wood for clean, cost-effective heating - Use the [color=#ffa500]Heat[/color] spell to instantly cook food without fuel costs
## Simple Transformations
These items transform automatically when heated to 400K:
| Input | Output | Temperature | |-------|--------|-------------| | Large Dough | Bread | 400K | | Raw Lamb Meat | Cooked Lamb | 400K | | Raw Egg | Cooked Egg | 400K |
## Meal Recipes
Meals are prepared at a [textlink="Cooking Workbench" link="OE14Crafting"] using ingredient tags.
### 1 Ingredient
| Recipe | Required Tags | |--------|---------------| | Green Salad | Salad + Vegetable | | Meat Plate | Meat + Meat Slice | | Bread Plate | Dough | | Mashed Potato | Potato |
### 2 Ingredients
| Recipe | Required Tags | |--------|---------------| | Green Salad with Meat | Salad+Vegetable, Meat | | Monster Egg | Egg, Monster Meat | | Mashed Potato with Meat | Potato, Meat | | Mashed Potato Salad | Potato, Salad+Vegetable | | Cheese Bread | Dough, Cheese |
### 3 Ingredients
| Recipe | Required Tags | |--------|---------------| | Zellasian Breakfast | Egg, Dough, Meat | | Stuffed Potato | Meat Slice, Cheese, Potato |
### 4 Ingredients
| Recipe | Required Tags | |--------|---------------| | Ham in Cheese | Pig Meat, Leg Meat, Cheese, Salad |
## Soup Recipes
Soups require Water (20 units) plus ingredients in a cooking pot.
### 2 Ingredients (Water + 1 Tag)
| Recipe | Required Tags | |--------|---------------| | Meat Soup | Meat | | Cheese Soup | Cheese | | Pumpkin Puree | Pumpkin |
### 3 Ingredients (Water + 2 Tags)
| Recipe | Required Tags | |--------|---------------| | Vegetable Soup | Salad+Vegetable (no Meat) | | Meat & Cheese Soup | Meat, Cheese | | Meat & Salad Soup | Meat, Salad+Vegetable | | Monster Brew | Monster Meat, Egg |
## Pie Recipes
Pies are prepared in a pie pan on the workbench.
| Recipe | Required Tags | |--------|---------------| | Vegetable Pie | Salad + Vegetable | | Meat Pie | Meat + Meat Slice | | Pumpkin Pie | Pumpkin |
## Tips & Tricks
- Watch the temperature — cooking is automatic once correct temperature is reached - Use appropriate heat sources — too much heat burns, too little doesn't cook - Use spells — Fire Creation and Heat spells make cooking much easier - Stock up on plates and bowls — meals must be served on appropriate dishes
## Related Pages
- [textlink="Crafting" link="OE14Crafting"] — create cooking tools and workbenches - [textlink="Magic" link="OE14Magic"] — use spells to enhance cooking - [textlink="Economy" link="OE14Economy"] — sell cooked food for profit
